items.title: Spatial multiomic atlas of human colorectal tumor microenvironment
items.summary: PI: Jane Okafor. Institution: Dana-Farber Cancer Institute. Award: $412,000. Project profiling tumor margins using high-plex in situ methods across patient cohorts.
items.why: Newly funded spatial tumor project in MDA territory. PI likely needs probes soon, reach out.

items.title: 10x Genomics launches Xenium Prime 5K expanded panel
items.summary: New high-plex panel announced with broader gene coverage and faster run times for the Xenium platform.
items.why: Direct competitor expanding high-plex offering. Prepare positioning talking points for reps this week.

items.title: RNAscope-based validation of spatial transcriptomics in fibrotic lung
items.summary: Nature Communications. Study uses RNAscope as orthogonal validation for spatial sequencing in IPF tissue.
items.why: High-profile paper using RNAscope for validation. Strong proof point and a warm lab to contact.

items.title: Benchmarking MERFISH and smFISH in neural tissue
items.summary: Preprint comparing multiplexed FISH approaches for sensitivity and throughput in mouse cortex.
items.why: Method comparison lab actively running FISH. Worth flagging for territory follow-up.

items.title: Bio-Techne reports Q3 FY26 results with spatial portfolio growth
items.summary: Quarterly results highlight double-digit growth in the spatial biology segment.
items.why: Own portfolio momentum. Useful confidence point in customer conversations.

items.title: Single-cell RNA atlas of zebrafish development
items.summary: Preprint mapping cell types across developmental stages using single-cell sequencing.
items.why: Single-cell not spatial. Low priority unless lab pivots to in situ methods.
